types.title: AXBarChartMessages
types.description: Messages configuration for bar chart empty states

props.name: noData
props.description: Message shown when no data is available

props.name: noDataHelp
props.description: Help text shown when no data is available
props.default: 'Please provide data to display the chart'

props.name: allHidden
props.description: Message shown when all bars are hidden

props.name: allHiddenHelp
props.description: Help text shown when all bars are hidden
props.default: 'Click on legend items to show bars'
